name: Eggs Sardou
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees.
2. Fill each artichoke bottom with chopped anchovy.
3. Arrange the filled artichoke bottoms on a baking sheet.
4. Heat for 5 minutes.
5. Set aside - keep warm.
6. Place a poached egg on top of each artichoke.
7. Drizzle with Sauce Hollandaise.
8. Sprinkle with chopped smoked ham and slivers of truffle.
9. Serve immediately.
